props.name: variant
props.description: Defines the color scheme and animation style.

props.name: gap
props.description: Pixel grid gap size in pixels.

props.name: colors
props.description: Comma-separated list of colors for the pixel effect.

props.name: noFocus
props.description: If true, prevents animation from triggering on focus.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the pixel effect container.
